name: 5 mins Shibuya Cat modern sunny  Shimokita
description:
Hi there, I am Wakana and I live with my two friendly cats.
I designed and built a house 11 years ago.
I am a business freelancer and one of my business is a real estate agent, so if you are looking for properties in Japan, I can be of a help!

My house is located near Ikenoue station, 5 minutes from Shibuya by Inokashira line. 12 mins walk to Shimokitazawa, hipster neighborhood.

If you have time, it would be nice to have a chat or go out for a drink.
neighborhood_overview:
The location is walkable distance to famous Shimokitazawa, known to be a posh residential area without any high rise buildings. In just 10 minutes you can be at the heart of the trendy, funky, and bohemian Shimokitazawa that has a smorgasbord of affordable yet mouth-wateringly good restaurants and vintage clothes shops. The house is well situated in between train stations: 5 minutes walk to Ikenoue station on Inokashira line, 3rd stop from Shibuya station. 8 minutes walk to Shimokitazawa station on Odakyu line, 10 minutes from Shimokitazawa to Shinjuku by train. All very convenient!

I am happy to share the map for the near-by restaurant (breakfast, lunch and dinner) once the booking is done!
host_about:
Hi there, I am Wakana! I am an openminded, friendly and postive person. That's what other say:)
I enjoy meeting new people via Airbnb and love it.

I used to live in Sydney and India altogether for 8 years in my 20s.

If you want to share some time with me, Let's grab drink or food!

name: Homestay at Host's House -  Senju-Ohashi Station
description:
Our accommodation offers:

1. **Great Accessibility**
Just a short walk from Kitasenju Station, with easy access to Ueno, Asakusa, and Narita and Haneda airports. Ideal for sightseeing and business.

2. **Peaceful Environment**
Located in a quiet residential area, perfect for relaxing while enjoying city conveniences.

3. **Reliable Support**
Always available to help with any questions or concerns for a worry-free stay.

We aim to make your visit comfortable and memorable.

There are shopping mall near Senjuohashi station.
supermarket,restaurants(Mcdonald's,Yoshinoya,Otoya,Chinese,Italian ) are 5min away.

Big hub station,Kitasenju is walking distance.15min by foot.
From Kitasenju,you can go Ginza,Roppongi,Tsukiji,Tokyo sky tree,even Nikko,Hakone directly.


Close to fish market.
you can enjoy fresh sashimi.

There are many Japanese pubric bath called ' SENTO' near my house.Everybody take a bath all naked.
There are some rules to take a bath,so I will teach you how to enjoy SENTO.

出身地　東京
好きなこと　旅行、テニス

We have visited more than 50countries.
Let'stalk about travel.

description:
We may be able to offer Late-check-out until 7pm on the check out date & Early-check-in from 11:30am. But please ask us for Late-check-out & Early-check-in availability before booking here.

we can hold the luggage from 9am on check-in date, also until 7pm on check-out date.

Good access to major sightseeing spots (20 ~ 55 minutes by walking+train+transfer)

neighborhood_overview:
Away from hustle and bustle of downtown, but just train rides to all the action.
Quaint neighborhood.

Many family-run shops and restaurants.

30 seconds ~ 1minutes to coin-car-parking

5 minutes walk to the local station

7 minute walk to the Supermarket and 24 hour convenience stores.
2 minute walk to river-side where you can jog or stroll.
15 minute walk to the public gym.
host_about:
As parents, one of our biggest worries when traveling is that our children will get sick.

We live just a short walk away, so we hope that guests can rely on us in case of an accident, illness, or other problems.

During more than 10 years as hosts, we've taken guests to the hospital many times, which has made us super happy when they have thanked us.

We have other listings, so even if the apartment is booked up, ask us the availability!

name: cute room, safty residential area in west-Tokyo
description:
⭐️Important: Starting in November 2023, we will only be hosting one female guest at a time. Oops!

This room is shared with a female host, except for the guest's private room. The key to the front door is left with the guest, so there is no curfew.
Bed, desk, chair, air conditioner, WiFi, towels, hair dryer, iron, TV, etc.

It takes 16 minutes on foot from the nearest station, so we recommend a bus or rental bike. Please let me know your arrival time in advance, and I will pick you up at the nearest station on the first day.

Have a good trip!
neighborhood_overview: There are convinient store, big park, bus stop to the station near from our house.
host_about:
⭐️重要　　2023年11月より、各回、女性のゲスト1人だけをお迎えすることに、なりました。申し訳ありません。

こちらの部屋は、ゲスト用の個室以外は、女性のホストと共有に、なります。玄関の合鍵はゲストに預けるので、門限はありません。
ベッド、デスク、椅子、エアコン、WiFi、タオル、ヘアドライヤー、アイロン、TVなどがあります。

最寄り駅からは、徒歩16分かかりますので、路線バスまたはレンタル自転車を、お勧めします。初日には、最寄り駅に迎えに行きますので、事前に到着時間をお知らせください。

name: Share House 'Miraie' @JR Osaki (Special discuont)
description: Discover a unique living experience at Share House Miraie in Shinagawa, Tokyo. Stay in a cozy private room with easy access to JR Osaki Station, connecting you to Shibuya Shinjuku, & Haneda Airport. Enjoy shared spaces like the living room, island kitchen & rooftop bath. This house also serves as a hub for meeting artists. Ideal for long-term stays, with a 35% monthly discount.Perfect for solo travelers looking to immerse themselves in Tokyo’s vibrant & artistic community. Book your stay now!
neighborhood_overview:
JR Osaki station is a station on the JR Yamanote line (one of the main JR lines which can access many major Tokyk stations including :　Shinjuku, Shibuya, Ikebukuro, Tokyo...etc.) There are also many other trains which will stop at Osaki station. There is a bus which comes directly to the Osaki trakn station from Narita Airport.

Togoshiginza shoutengai is Japanese local shop street. And this is the longest shop street in Tokyo. You can eat Yakitori, Ramen, Okonomiyaki and so on.
It takes 5 minutes on foot by our house.
host_about: Hi, I'm Li. Running an Airbnb for 13 years, since my daughter was born. We both love art, music, people, and animals. Fluent in Chinese, English, and Japanese, I manage two brands: Miraie ("future house") and Lab 8 at my home & my work place. I focus on distinctive design, community engagement, and positive relationships. It's a new lifestyle resonating with values of connection, sociality, and art, often overlooked in modern life.

Condominium with big rooftop located in Sakurashinmachi, Setagaya.

Once you go up the spiral staircase, you will have a nice view of Tokyo.

The apartment have Japanese room, dining kitchen, utility room and providing spacious bathroom and independent toilet. Each room has a cozy layout which ensure your comfortable stay.

Distinguished and spacious condo to enjoy living in Tokyo with modest luxury.
neighborhood_overview: Escape the noise of downtown Tokyo, while maintaining easy access to the major sights, in this comfortable studio apartment located in the upscale residential area, Setagaya. Experience a slice of Tokyo life, while enjoying one of the many parks in the area, including the Olympic park. Take the nearby Den-en-toshi line to reach two contrasting shopping areas a few stops away: Futako-Tamagawa on one side provides all the conveniences of a major shopping center, and Sangenjaya a place to get lost in the narrow streets lined with restaurants and shops. A stop away from Sangenjaya and you reach Shibuya, allowing you to access all that Tokyo has to offer.

name: #1 Discover local life, culture & People/Work desk
description:
Hi, this is Toshi, an English speaker. Welcome to this neighborhood and my home. This area, called YaNeSen(Yanaka, Sendagi, Nezu), has preserved the charm as creating a contrast of old and new at the same time. It's because of the tendency to re-purpose older buildings rather than rebuilding. My home is a big house in good condition even located in central Tokyo. I manage this house as enjoying sharing life. In a word, the best place to feel local life in Tokyo.

Discount for 7, 14, 21 28 nights
neighborhood_overview:
Super convenient location to get around Tokyo.
6 min walk from the nearest subway station.
A gate area to central Tokyo from airport.

Here is a remaining authentic downtown in Tokyo. A quiet neighborhood with one of the most vivid local market street in Tokyo, beautiful sakura-lined cemetery, plenty of temples, old and new indie cafes, restaurants, shops and stalls, some of which have passed down through generations, and art galleries, etc. All of them are within 1-15 mins walking distance. So now here attracts both Japanese and foreigner visitors so much. Just lovely area.

- Local shopping street, Yanaka Ginza (10 mins walk)
- Yanaka Cemetery (10 mins walk)
- Ueno Park (15 mins walk)
- University of Tokyo (15 mins walk)
- 24/7 convenience store (5 min walk)
- Supermarket (6 min walk)
- Drugstores (3 min walk)
host_about:
Hi there.
A serial entrepreneur since late twenties. After got tired of the work life, shifted to live my life, not for work.
- Managing a share/guest house
- Business/Team building/Communication trainer
- Self-awareness session

Managing a vacation rental / second house in a country seaside area.  
Down shifted with less money, less stress, more time, more happiness.

東京都町田市生まれ。これまで東京、神奈川、埼玉、群馬、長野に住んだことがあります。

どうぞ宜しくお願い致します！

name: Tatoo ok! Tokyo Onsen and Room【寿】
description:
We are fully licensed and registered in the city of Tokyo as accommodation facilities.
We are welcome any Tattoo people for onsen There is a hot spring from the 1600s. Tattoo is OK!!
The apartment is on the east side of Tokyo since 1969. It is Japanese Quiet residential area a little old apartment. 6min to subway station from Apartment. Shinjuku, Shibuya, Roppongi is about 50 minutes by subway.
Make sure to confirm the location of the apartment and make a reservation.
neighborhood_overview:
The Neighborhood
■ Overview of neighborhood
The apartment is six minutes away from Funabori Station, the area is quiet, and the residents are all nice people. There are lots of small restaurants in the area, and travelers are very welcome.

There is also a supermarket, three minutes walk away from the apartment. It is convenient for buying daily necessities, food, and medical supplies.

On the premises of the apartment, there is a hot spring with a 400 year history. It also has a sauna. In Japan this is called a "Public Bath"←”Sen-to" and people pay to enter the baths.
Eat some delicious food, relax in the hot spring, and make yourself feel at home in the room.
host_about:
Quiet town of Tokyo."Funabori APARTMENTs"
We made a special room in order to get enjoy Japan to the special guest.
We are graced my collection of tea ceremony tools and kimono.
Please, enjoy the Japanese culture.
We are looking forward to seeing you and your family.
Thank you.
Masa and Nanako

description:
【JAPANESE SPEAKER PREFERRED】
It's a Japanese-style private room with Tatami flooring (畳) and Futons (布団), therefore you can enjoy your stay in real Japanese style!!!

The other residents in this house are Japanese and only speak JAPANESE, guests learning Japanese or persons already able to speak Japanese are preferred.

neighborhood_overview: Located in a safe suburban neighborhood in the peacful and charming city of Kokubunji. Everything you need in walking distance! host_about:
Hello, Everyone!!
I am Como House which was built in Kokubunji in 1970's.
I am managed by Como family as a shared house since 2012. 

I have several  individual rooms, dining room & kitchen and family-type bathroom.
Here is located in a suburb and a little far from the center of Tokyo, but I can offer typical daily life in Japan and I hope you enjoy it!!
We're looking forward to meeting you ^^

neighborhood_overview:
Though Higashimurayama has not known so much by foreigners,there are so many cultural heritage and the local feeling and communication that you can not experience in the busy areas.
1)The only National Treasure in Tokyo is here in Higashimurayama city. ShofukuTemple is the only one selected in Tokyo as most fascinating 100 architectures of the world.
2)Hachikoku mountain is known as a place forms in the setting of the Ghibli movie,Totoro.
3)There are many different restaurant types out here varied from Sushi,Tempura,Ramen,and some other non-Japanese cuisine such as Indian,Italian,Chinese,Korean,and so on.

host_about: 我叫文娟，来自中国上海，丈夫是好客的日本人，只会说日语和一点英文，有一个可爱的儿子。我们全家经常出去旅游，我是Airbnb房客，也是Airbnb房东我非常了解客人的需求，我一定会让Airbnb的客人来我这里有家的温心，我的房子是一栋别墅，有四层楼， 有五间房间出租，同时可以住14个人，欢迎大家庭，和朋友一起来住，我家有三个大厨房可以自己做饭吃，有三个洗手间，有二个洗澡间，我文娟住在二楼，不上班每天在家，您们在旅游方面，有什么需求，什么地方有好吃的，有好玩的都可以问我，我家附进有好多小吃店，拉面店，日本居酒屋，有日本小京都，有备用房一次可以接待十位客人，别墅位于东京市中心，距离最近的电车站（东武东上线 上板桥车站）徒步7分钟，离日本第二大站池袋非常近，池袋是个大车站，5分钟到新宿，10分钟到涉谷，原宿，以及上野等各个地点，交通非常便利，住宿条件优越，价格实惠。我来日本近30多年了，对于日本各方面都比较了解，可以为大家的旅程提供很好的建议。如有需要的朋友还可以提供接站服务（上板桥车站）欢迎大家入住！

Chapter Two Tokyo is the best place as a hub for your travel in Tokyo.
*We are located in 1 min walk from Asakusa Station and facing Sumida River.
*You can get direct train from both Narita Airport and Haneda Airport.
*At this Family-run, Small & Cozy hostel, you can make new friends and happy memory.
neighborhood_overview:
One minute on foot from Asakusa Station.
It is a 3-minute walk to Kaminarimon, Sensoji Temple, within walking distance of the Sky Tree and very convenient for sightseeing.
Because convenience stores, restaurants, post offices, pharmacies, etc. are all in the vicinity, people staying continuously can stay without stress.

name: Female Dormitory (Breakfast Included)
description:
Comfortable stays for female guests in dormitory-style rooms! Rooms are shared with other hotel guests. Bunk beds. No amenities included. Bed-making fee is included. Yukata robes and towels are not provided.

No water facility in the room. Bath rooms (toilet and shower) located in each floor are shared. Breakfast included.


We also offer tours, workshops and international events.
Check from the website :
https://www.meetup.com/international-meetup-tokyo/
neighborhood_overview: No smoking in the hotel building including rooms (Smoking only at terrace seats area in the 1st floor). We would like to offer not only reasonable price but also homely and friendly feel with facilities and service that makes your stay more comfortable.
host_about: English speaking staff are on duty 24 hours a day to help you. We welcome any kind of question, both night and day, including what to see, eat, buy, and experience in Tokyo; how to get to sightseeing spots; the latest event and night clubbing information; how to explore Eastern Japan and the countryside; and more! Staff members who can speak English and Japanese are at the front desk 24 hours a day, where they respond to questions at any time regarding midnight arrivals, sightseeing, traffic information, etc.

description:
High grade Hostel at famous Residential area of Azabu yet Very Convenient. 1 minute to Subway Akabanebashi station.
Very safe> Auto Lock system for both entrances of building and guest area and 24 hours Staff stationing ensure the safety. Separate Lady's floor give extra privacy for lady guests. Partition and roll curtain of each bed keep the privacy.

There are many convenience stores and super market for daily need and also many nice restaurants in variety of food type.
neighborhood_overview:
Extremely convenient location yet Quiet:
Just 1 minute to subway station.
5-25 minutes to all major terminals in Tokyo.

Quiet residential area with a few embassies and Neighbouring area is most popular for eating and fashion.

Tokyo Tower, Zojoji Temple (Tokugawa Shogun family temple), Shiba Park (Beautiful Cherry Blossom in Spring), Keio Gijuku University Campus(Oldes college in Japan) etc. are in 5-7 minutes walking distance. Atagoyama (first radio broadcasting station in Japan and Japan Broadcasting Museum) famous for cherry blossom in Spring and most fashinable Azabujuban, are in 10 minutes walk.

name: ☆YAWP☆（1 bed/12bedroom）I used to be a Manga artist
description:
Listing for〈1 beds/ 12 bedroom〉.

YAWP! backpackers is a small hostel because the focus is placed on cultural exchange and a comfortable environment. As I traveled around the world visiting over 100 hostels, I found that small hostels could be enjoyable too.

I hope to invite travelers around the world, and they gather together, enjoy stories, relax as friends under a common roof, and above all, sleep well !

My goal is to provide the most comfortable and friendly hostel accommodations in Japan.
neighborhood_overview: We are located a bit outside of Tokyo city central. But, it is really calm and clean town. And also, people are friendly and welcoming.
host_about:
I used to be a comic（manga）artist.
And I'm geek of “Star wars” “football”and “furnitures”, to be honest.
I have traveled worldwide（46 countries）and had many exchanges with locals and tourists as well. By meeting many nice and helpful people from different cultural backgrounds my traveling experience became much more enjoyable. 
Because of these great experiences, I became motivated to open my own hostel in order to show my appreciation by sharing the charm of Japan.

All our staff would like to make your journey! Not only in our hostel, but whole trip in Japan!
If you need any other things, there are convenience store and super market just around the corner!
neighborhood_overview:
obi Hostel is located in the down town area of Tokyo. So you can explore historical spot and feel local atmosphere.
Visit “Asakusa area” which is one of the most famous sightseeing spots in Tokyo. Just 5min from obi by subway, but go there on foot along the “Sumida River”. It may take longer(apx.30min), but flat. What I like is the view from the river side. You can see old, new, low, high buildings and Tokyo Sky Tree. You’ve might been to other countries, but have you ever seen disordered but well-proportioned city, like this Tokyo. Worth to do!
Of course, if you take a subway for 10min, you will be in skyscrapers jungle.

This listing is by request. If there is no reply to the question from the host, it will be canceled in 24 hours
We can not accept early check-in, late check-in, late check-out
The rooms are only female dormitory (same room with bunk bed)
Please be careful as male guests can not stay
If you make a mistake by any chance you may not be able to stay
In that case cancellation and refund can not be done

You can stay with other guests while staying
The living room is a unisex shared space
neighborhood_overview:
There are a lot of Izakaya in the neighborhood and it is not troubled to eat and drink.
Because the convenience store is also near, it is not troubled.
It is a 2-minute walk to the convenience store (FamilyMart).
It is a 5-minute walk to a supermarket. It opens until late-night 23:00.

There are a Japanese bar, a beef bowl shop, rotisserie, a tempura shop, a Japanese food shop around a guest house.

It is five minutes by a train to Haneda Airport international terminal. The fare is 290 yen.

It is ten minutes by taxi to Haneda Airport international terminal. The fare is approximately 1,700 yen. ※It is approximately 2,100 yen after 22:00. (4.2km)

List the time by the train before going below to the sightseeing popularity spot near Tokyo and Tokyo.

・It is 45 minutes by a train to Shinjuku. The fare is 400 yen. (18km)

・It is 35 minutes by a train to Ginza. The fare is 460 yen. (15km)

・It is 50 minutes
host_about:
茶道､漫画が好きでいろんな人に日本をもっと楽しんでもらいたいと思っています｡
特に漫画が好きなゲストさんに来てほしいです！

･茶道のこと
敷居の高そうな茶道をもっと手軽に､若い人にも｢こんな感じだよ｣と知ってもらう場所として始めました｡
茶室で抹茶を飲んでお菓子を食べるだけでも楽しめます｡

･漫画のこと
今や日本が誇る文化の一つとなった漫画
若い時からずっと好きで買い続けたらえらい冊数になったので､これはみんなに見てもらおう!ということで置くことにしました｡
漫画のことでお話しできたら嬉しいです！

I like tea ceremony and manga, and I want to make various people enjoy Japan more.

･ Tea ceremony
The tea ceremony, which seems to have a high threshold, was started as a place to make it easier for young people to know "this is what it looks like."
You can enjoy just drinking tea and eating sweets in the tea room.

･ Cartoon
Manga has become one of the cultures that Japan is proud of
I liked it since I was young, and if I keep buying it, it will be a great number of books, so I decided to put it on to let everyone see it!

Renovated in August 2020.

This spacious 30㎡ apartment hotel is fully furnished and equipped with home appliances. Travelers staying for long periods of time will feel right at home.

We have been the super host on Airbnb for many years and now we want to provide our guests with new space.

We are an interior design team, we have always been a Superhost on Airbnb, and now we want to offer our friends a brand new accommodation space, looking forward to seeing you in Tokyo!

description:
Hello.
Thank you visiting our Shin-koenji Guest House Page.

This location is perfect for your stay in Tokyo.

1. Only Female
This Guest House is for Women Only.
No male can enter here.

2. Privacy
All rooms have their own Key.
Therefore, no one can enter your room without the specific key.

3. Newly Built
This Guest House was built in September 2017.

4. Free Wi-Fi
High Speed Wireless connection is available.

5. Security Cameras
We have full security majors for your safety.
neighborhood_overview:
It is located in a quiet residential area, 10 minutes by foot from the station.

There is Seven Eleven and Summit Supermarket within one-minute distance.

There are restaurants, shopping districts and public baths in the surrounding area.

There is also a bus stop just 3 minutes’ walk from the guesthouse, from where you can access straight to Shinjuku station and Shibuya station.

We guarantee you a perfect stay at our Guest House.

Please feel free to contact us for any other information.
host_about:
Hi! I am Lee Sangwon. 

I am a Korean decent born in Japan. 
You can communicate with me in Japanese, English and Korean. 

We will assist you in all manner and try to make your stay as comfortable and trouble free as possible. 

Please feel free to contact us for any queries. 

Thank You.

Our traditional color Indigo Bule tells us something beautiful memories in the past of Japan and exciting experience at now in downtown!
We call here is Indigo flat, which inspire you to be something new!
Located just right center at Asakusa - Kappabashi area , You can go Ueno to Skytree on foot. Hope to have wonderful memories at our downtown. Free WiFi is available.

host_about:
I am a writer, I have been a lot of places all over the world with my job,
Africa , Asia , Islamic countries, Europe, Latin america…etc.

Finally I realized that I want to build my own paradise at my grown-uped area with my artists friends after I traveled more than 100 countries.
This is the answer at the present , so now I am very happy I do my best to introduce our culture, our home town, our lovely people.

The villa here is the paradise, Small but rich-hearted.

Thank you.

name: 15 mins walk Asakusa,10 mins Ryogoku stn
description: Your private room is located on the ground floor.The ground floor also has a toilet and the host's room.On Level 1, you can find the shared bathroom(with shower), kitchen and living room. Level 2 (the top floor) is the host's space and not shared.Basically, we live in the house-so if you have any questions/requests , please feel free to ask anytime.We also have a big car so we can take you around by car if our schedules match.
neighborhood_overview:
Our home is located in Ryogoku-Japan's home of Sumo Wrestling! A quick Google search will reveal a lot about the area. Our home is situated 15 mins(by foot) North-East of Ryogoku JR Station.
If you're travelling from Narita or Haneda Airport, first go to Oshiage Station underneath Tokyo Skytree. From there, it is only a 7 minute taxi ride to our home. If our schedules match, I can pick you up at the Station by car.
host_about:
Hello, I am Sayoko.
I live with my daughter’s family in my 3-storey house in Tokyo. We have two children living here (a 6-year old girl and a 4-year old boy). 
I don’t speak English well but I can immediately contact my son by phone who is living in Canada if needed. Also, my daughter Setsuko (who lives here) can speak conversational English.
I have hosted many international students at my home before - so I am used to guests.
We hope you have a wonderful time in Japan.

name: #201 From Asakusa sta.  about 500m
description:
The house is simple hotel, it's three-story house, there are 3 independent floors, this room is on 2F. 1st and 3rd floors are another guest’s rooms.
In this room, there are a shower room, a kitchen and a toilet, a microwave, an electric kettle and a fridge. it's all for your private use.
there is a fiber optic internet WiFi at home. No portable Wifi.
No a washing machine in the house, but there’s a coin laundry nearby, they are open every day and 24 hours.
neighborhood_overview:
The house is located close to Asakusa area, You will find a lot of restaurant, bar, convenience stores, game center, and other entertainment spots in the area.
There is a supermarket named Life near the house, walk to there about 6 minutes. A drugstore is nearby, as well as a huge Don Quijote "Super-Store" which is rather unique in Tokyo. You can get anything from there. Asakusa is near to central of Tokyo surrounded by many streets for tourist shopping. Sensoji temple is very well known temple at Asakusa, one of the most famous tourist destinations in Japan. after dark is great for photos and less people but go before 10pm as it will turn the light off.
Kappabashi Dogugai street is near the house, a shopping area with a proud history of over 100 years. This 800m long street is lined up with more than 170 wholesale stores offering Japanese, western and Chinese tableware, all types of kitchenware and more. You can walk there about 5 minutes from the house.
The house is

neighborhood_overview:
Sumida Ward is home to a famous cherry blossom viewing area (along the Sumida River near Asakusa Station) in spring and the Sumida River Fireworks Festival (Hanabi Matsuri) in summer. Perfect spot for romance-manic :)

The area also boasts a great many Tokyo landmarks such as Tokyo Skytree (you can literally see it from our place), cultural museums (Edo-Tokyo Museum and Tobu Museum), and Ryogoku Kokugikan (Tokyo's main sumo stadium). So if you wanna have a taste of daily yet unique Tokyo lives, don't miss those attractions.

With convenient rail lines and railway stations, you can explore other wards of Tokyo with ease since they bring you to everywhere you might wanna go as a tourist.

It would be a wise choice to start your journey with Japan from here :)

name: kominka
description:
Wooden construction is common in Japanese houses. Wooden architecture is a method of building houses using wood as a structural material, such as pillars and beams. This method is suitable for the climate and topography of Japan, providing a living environment that is airy, resistant to moisture, cool in summer, and warm in winter.

Wooden architecture is a traditional architectural style from ancient Japan and is valued as one of Japan's cultural heritages. Many wooden houses are still built today, and using wood can give a home the warmth and texture of nature.

However, wooden houses have issues such as earthquake resistance and fire resistance, and in recent years, the development of safer and more durable wooden houses has been promoted by incorporating new technologies and materials.

host_about:
The beginning of the journey.
I was a steel worker. It was Cleveland, body and mind were frozen.
I never been good at studying, I haven't been able to work well at the company, and I wasn't good at human relations. Everything was bad in Cleveland.
 If you ask me like or dislike whole life in Cleveland,  Of course I say I hate it, but I loved it so much that tears came.
On Christmas holidays, I missed the warmth of the sun and headed south.
I drove Dodge for 30 hours to get away from something.
 I grew up in the Pacific and the sea was blue. The Atlantic I saw for the first time was green. Like the color of your eyes. I'm sorry I couldn't understand you  well.
I was struck by a squall with a hole in the back on the beach in Florida   I was crying without knowing. I wonder what it was.
 A car runs over the sea to Key West. I had a sunset in small island and I ate a pizza. Hey, I can eat olives on the pizza now.
 I thought towards the sunset. "I love you" but I can't say I love you. Can I quit the job? I don't want to go back there. I want to go further south.
She said there is only ocean you can’t go further !
 "Are you okay?"

 Of course I’m not okay,
I know  I’m not okay !

Where am I going?
How far will I reach?
Is there anything beyond the end of the south?
I was 25 years old.

If you are lost in your life, even if you do not know  you are running away or pursuing, I will sincerely congratulate you on your journey.
Even if you don't know what it is. One day I want you to tell me if you discover it, This is between you and me.
I still don't know anything. But maybe you and I were promised to meet on the way.

I want to be a gentle guy just a little more than before.
 I think so now.

neighborhood_overview:
About ■Mitaka
Mitaka is conveniently located 15 minutes from Shinjuku and 3 minutes from Kichijoji, yet it has the appearance of an old-fashioned, relaxed town. It is also famous as the nearest station to the Gibli Art Museum. From a variety of restaurants, antique shops, stylish cafes and variety shops, to old-fashioned public baths and 100-yen shops, it is well balanced with everything from tasteful individual shops to convenient mass retailers.

I think it's a great place to stroll around Tokyo as if you were living there, as it's not too crowded.

Relax in the■ public baths and Shidaji-onsen Hot Springs

There is a traditional public bath, Harunoyu, a 5-minute walk away. You can bathe until 23: 00, and you can also enjoy the medicinal bath, sitting bath, micron bath, hot water bath, and sauna for an extra charge.

description:
Take it easy at this unique and tranquil getaway. You can use the two rooms on the second floor, including the bedroom and extra room. The place can accommodate up to 5 people, including the extra room

The extra room is indoors, but you can also enjoy the⛺ feeling of camping

We also offer light meal sets (fees not included) such as healthy homemade spice curry mixed grain rice, and homemade healthy pasta and udon.

Guests who wish to do so can also enjoy cooking experiences such as spice curry, drip coffee, and homemade pickles

Transfer to and from Ome Station and the nearest station

How about leaving the hustle and bustle of the city behind and spending a quiet time at the edge of nature as it changes with the seasons, including cherry blossoms in spring, rice fields in summer, autumn leaves, and winter frost.

ご質問などございましたら、お気軽にお問い合わせ下さい。

name: Central Ginza Deluxe Studio 40sqm + Washer-Dryer
description:
In the heart of Ginza, this studio will be your personal sanctuary for a month or more here. Experience more than just Ginza’s luxurious image as a treasure trove of local surprises lie waiting to be discovered around every corner. At the end of your stay, you’ll leave as a ginbura (someone who wanders around Ginza leisurely) expert!
Also, it's 4 mins on foot away from both Ginza and Higashi-Ginza station and right next to Ginza’s newest mall with a rooftop garden.
neighborhood_overview: From Michelin-star restaurants to little boutique shops selling unique statement pieces, anything you need or want, you will find in Ginza. It doesn’t get more convenient than this. You’re also right next to Ginza’s newest mall with a rooftop garden and a huge bookstore.
host_about:
Section  L was founded by a team of passionate hoteliers in 2020. As avid travelers ourselves we understand your time in the city is limited; you want to skip to the good parts right away.

Section L is the place where it all starts. A gateway to something fresh. A springboard to the unknown. We’ll help you create your own adventure, embrace the happy accidents and experience the greatest city on earth. (Note: some assembly required!)

host_about:
初めまして！
僕の名前はKensuke Sakamotoです。みんなにはKenと呼ばれています。
今年からAirbnbホストを始めました。
出身地は広島県で、小さい頃は熊本に住んでいました。
父親が大阪出身なので大阪にもよく行きます。

20歳の頃にオーストラリアのシドニーにワーキングホリデーとして２年間住んでいました。ゲストハウスに住んでおり、色々な国の人との交流がとても好きでした。
また、2022年に友達が沖縄でAirbnbの民泊を誘ってくれ、始めて民泊を知りました。
それらの経験がきっかけでAirbnbホストを始めました。

本業はフリーランスでWeb Engineerをしています。
働きながら旅行をするのが大好きです。

色々な街にご飯を食べに行くことが好きです。
特に三軒茶屋、下北沢、北千住、上野、秋葉原、渋谷、新宿にはとても詳しいので
なんでも僕に聞いてください！

Airbnbホストを始めたばかりですが
色々な人たちと会って、楽しく交流したいと思っています！

neighborhood_overview:
Asakusa is one of the most popular tourist spots in Japan.
Kaminarimon, one of the entrance gates to Sensoji Temple, is said to have been built over 1,000 years ago and is a symbol of Asakusa/Sensoji Temple, and one of the most popular Buddhist buildings.
In addition, if you walk for a few minutes along the Sumida River that flows under the Higashi Bridge, you will see a magnificent view of the Sky Tree.
Other areas that are easily accessible by taxi or train include Ameyoko, Nihonbashi, Coredo Muromachi, Tokyo Station, Ginza, Tsukiji, Harajuku, Omotesando, Shibuya, Roppongi, and Odaiba.

The property is a 3-minute walk from Waseda Station and has easy access to Shinjuku Station and Shin-Okubo Station.
The property was built in 2021, so you can enjoy your stay in a clean and comfortable room.
The property can be used for a wide range of purposes, from short-term stays for travel, etc. to long-term stays.
neighborhood_overview:
The area around Waseda Station, located in Shinjuku-ku, is attractive for its easy access to major stations such as Shinjuku, Ikebukuro, and Shibuya.
Since it is a student town, there are many residential areas, except for the area around the university, where there are many pedestrians.
There are many supermarkets and convenience stores that are essential for daily life, so shopping will not be a problem.

description:
The living area is a spacious 40㎡, offering an open and airy atmosphere.
This one-of-a-kind accommodation beautifully blends Japanese modern and Western styles.

The hotel boasts excellent access.
Located in the heart of Asakusa and near the Tokyo Skytree, where history and modernity intersect, both are within walking distance.

You can reach major tourist attractions like Ginza, Ueno, Akihabara, and the Disney Resort in a short time by train.
It's the perfect base for exploring Tokyo!

name: 浅草駅から徒歩13分！東京スカイツリーもすぐ！/家具・家電付き/VILLETTIN c01
description:
Within walking distance of Asakusa station, with good access from both Narita and Haneda airports.It is an ideal location as a base for sightseeing in Tokyo, close to tourist attractions such as the Tokyo Skytree, Asakusa Temple, and Kaminarimon.
The interior is simple yet stylish, creating a relaxing space.
You can rest from your travels in a bright room with natural light coming in from the large windows.
There are many convenience stores, restaurants, and shopping streets in the area, so you can have a comfortable stay even for long periods.
A great place to stay for sightseeing and business, combining the atmosphere of Asakusa's downtown with modern comforts.

* Wifi is free to use.
* We can accommodate your desired length of stay from a short trip of a few days to a long stay of 3 months or more.
neighborhood_overview:
Asakusa Station is the gateway to a popular tourist destination where you can feel the traditional Japanese culture and the atmosphere of the downtown area.
You can fully enjoy the history and lively shopping street at Asakusa Temple and Nakamise Street, which are just a short walk away.
The Skytree and Sumida River are also nearby, making it a great location to enjoy the scenery of Tokyo.
It is also attractive that there are plenty of Japanese experiences, such as rickshaw experiences and kimono rentals.
There are also plenty of shopping malls and restaurants directly connected to the station, so it is convenient for taking a break between sightseeing.
Access is also good, and it is a location that is easy to get to from the city center and the airport.

name: 【Monthly】A-4 min walk from Hakusan Sta/2p/Wi-Fi
description:
-RIZOTIA HAKUSAN-
OPEN October 2024
Fully rented and available

There is no elevator.

Great location, 4 minutes walk from Hakusan Station!

[Notes]
*Check-in: 3pm
*Check-out: 10am
*Please treat guest room amenities with care.
*Please be careful not to leave anything behind. Food items will be discarded, and other items left behind will be stored for one week.
*Please gather up your trash when you leave the room

*This room can accommodate 2 people. Single use is also possible*
host_about:
Hello
My name is Hirofumi Masuda.
I had been in the US for 3 years, in Italy for 4 months, in Canada for 2 months. I had lived in SF, NY, Philly, Victoria island, Rome, and Florence.

And I also traveled to Netherland, Poland, Croatia, Thailand, China, and South Korea. 

There will be no language barriers between you and me.
When you have some problems, I will help you to solve those problems.
I know how hard to live in other countries because I experienced that.
I love people from all over the world.

My academic status
Victoria University (Canada)
Delaware Country Community College (PA,USA)
John Cabot University (Rome, Italy)
Temple University, Japan Campus (Tokyo, Japan)

Soccer is a part of my life. If you like it, please talk to me about it!!!

Please let me know if you are interested in staying here
I'll be happy to provide a room. :)

Carpe Diem
Hiro

　　Takadanobaba Station is a major station in Tokyo, known for its student population and office districts. The station sees an average of about 900,000 passengers per day (including JR, subway, and private railway lines). The area is home to educational institutions such as Waseda University and Japan Foreign Language College, attracting a large number of students. It is also a hub for business and tourism.

2. Convenient Transportation Access
　　Takadanobaba Station is served by the following major railway lines:
　　・JR Yamanote Line
　　・Seibu Shinjuku Line
　　・Tokyo Metro Tozai Line
　　This provides excellent access to key areas in Tokyo such as Shinjuku, Shibuya, and Ikebukuro, as well as suburban areas along the Seibu Line. Additionally, the area has extensive bus services, making it easy to travel to nearby locations like Waseda, Mejiro, and Kagurazaka.

host_about:
はじめまして。

このページをご覧いただき、ありがとうございます！
私はこの宿を通して、旅の中で感じる“あたたかさ”や“つながり”を、少しでも多くの方に感じてもらえたらと思い、民泊を始めました。

自分自身、これまで何度も海外を旅してきました。
その中で現地の人と関わる楽しさや、文化の違いに驚いたり感動したりする体験をたくさんしてきました。
同時に、海外に行けば行くほど「日本ってすごく素敵な国なんだな」と改めて感じることも多くなりました。

「日本って素晴らしいね！」
そんなふうに言ってくれる外国の方に出会うたびに、本当に嬉しくなります。
だからこそ、日本に訪れてくれるゲストの皆さんにも、日本の魅力をもっと知ってもらいたい。

宿としての快適さはもちろん、メッセージを通じたサポートにも力を入れています。
道に迷ったら行き方をお伝えしたり、レストランを紹介したり、旅先で困ったことがあればすぐにお手伝いします。
この宿が、ただ泊まる場所としてだけでなく、旅の心強い味方になれたら嬉しいです。

neighborhood_overview:
Sumida Ward is known as a town with a traditional downtown atmosphere. The Oshiage area is home to the Tokyo Sky Tree, a popular tourist attraction, and is famous for attracting many tourists from Japan and abroad.
The Hikifune area, which has been undergoing development in recent years, is lined with large supermarkets and other stores, while the downtown area has stores and parks with lush greenery, creating a relaxed atmosphere.
host_about:
わたしたち「Sumyca」は、スマホ1つで住宅、宿泊共に予約が完結する短期賃貸プラットフォームです。全国で１５００室以上の物件を運営するmatsuri technologies株式会社の予約サイトとして、世界各国から日本にお越しになる皆さまに宿泊施設を提供しています。

Sumycaが扱うすべての物件ではスマートチェックインを導入しており、スマホ１つで契約からチェックインまで、全てオンラインで完結することができます。

お困り事やご質問は、コンシェルジュがすぐにご対応させていただきますので、初めての東京滞在でも安心です。

東京都内は山手線内を中心に、観光やリモートワークに便利な物件を数多く揃えております。

東京はグルメ、ショッピング、エンターテイメントなどの大都市ならではの楽しみはもちろん、歌舞伎などの伝統芸能から現代アートまで様々な文化に触れることが可能です。

東京滞在をぜひお楽しみください。

description:
Located near Sensoji Temple & Tokyo Skytree, our apartment hotel blends tradition with modernity. Just a 7-minute walk from Honjo-Azumabashi Station, guests can easily reach Asakusa and Sumida River. Convenience stores and local eateries are nearby.

Each bright modern tatami guest room features a kitchenette, tatami table and chairs, a mix of modern and traditional Japanese design. Our four-story raw concrete building offers peace and privacy, with two units per floor, secured by keypad locks.
neighborhood_overview:
Located in Tokyo’s Higashi-Komagata district of Sumida Ward, LiveGRACE Asakusa Hotel offers the perfect blend of traditional and modern Tokyo charm. The area is known for its unique "shitamachi" (downtown) culture, making it an ideal place to explore traditional Tokyo.

The hotel is situated in a quiet alley, surrounded by low-rise houses and individual residences, ensuring a peaceful and secure environment. It is just a 7-minute walk from Honjo-Azumabashi Station.

The hotel’s prime location offers easy access to several iconic attractions. The Sumida River, known for its stunning seasonal scenery, is just an 8-minute walk away, and visitors can experience Japan’s largest summer fireworks festival, the Sumida River Fireworks Festival, up close. A 12-minute walk takes you to the historic Sensoji Temple/Kaminari Gate and the bustling Asakusa shopping street.

The modern Tokyo Skytree and its surrounding shopping area are just 15 minutes on foot. You can a

neighborhood_overview:
This apartment is located in a quiet residential neighborhood in the Yotsuya area of Shinjuku, right in the heart of Tokyo.
Just a 6-minute walk from Yotsuya Station, it offers the convenience of central Tokyo with the comfort of a peaceful environment.

Nearby are Suga Shrine (featured in the anime film Your Name) and Sotobori Park, known for its cherry blossoms and historical charm.
You'll also find plenty of conveniences such as convenience stores, cafés, restaurants, supermarkets, and drugstores—perfect for a long-term stay.

With access to four train lines—JR Chuo & Sobu Lines, and Tokyo Metro Marunouchi & Namboku Lines—you can easily reach major destinations like Shinjuku, Shibuya, Ginza, Tokyo Station, and Ueno. It’s an ideal location for both sightseeing and business.

・JR Chuo & Sobu Lines – Yotsuya Station (6-min walk)
・Tokyo Metro Marunouchi & Namboku Lines – Yotsuya Station (6-min walk)

name: Triphome Tokyo Sugamo 2024 New 3 mins 2 stations
description:
⚑ Brand New! Cozy and modern 40㎡ room in a stylish building with an elevator, completed in October 2024.
⚑ Cozy 6-person room featuring 2 bedrooms with 2 double Japanese floor mattresses (140x200cm) and a double sofa bed (120x200cm).
⚑ Convenient transportation: Just a 2-minute walk (130m) to Sugamo Station on the Yamanote Line.
⚑ Direct, non-stop access to Shinjuku, Ikebukuro, Harajuku, Shibuya, Ueno, Meguro, Ginza, Tokyo Tower, Tokyo station and more.
neighborhood_overview:
✓ Culinary Delights: A variety of restaurants within a 5-minute walk, from ramen and sushi to yakiniku, izakayas, and donburi.
✓ Sugamo Shopping Street: Experience nostalgic Japanese snacks and local culture.
✓ Local Culture: Visit nearby shrines and traditional Japanese bathhouses.
✓ Shopping Essentials: Supermarkets, pharmacies, and cosmetic stores just 5 minutes away.
✓ Everyday Necessities: Many convenience stores and coffee shops within walking distance.
✓ Excellent Connectivity: Easy access to public transportation via the Yamanote Line and Mita Line, giving you seamless connections throughout Tokyo!
host_about:
I am a travel addict.
Traveling in Japan has made me fall in love with the unique culture and beautiful scenery here.
Since there are often problems or inconveniences with lodging when traveling, I decided to prepare my own lodging for travelers. Our lodges are not decorated in a flashy way, we spend all our money on practical features for travelers.
When you stay in our "Triphome" you just need to focus on enjoying your trip and don't worry about anything else.

name: NewOpen!3 min walk Akihabara 52㎡ fully renovated
description:
・Just a 3-minute walk from Akihabara's main street, this room is perfect for exploring the electric town.
・A spacious room (52m²) that can accommodate up to 4 people.
・The dining area is also spacious, so even large groups can relax.
・Excellent access to Shinjuku, Shibuya, Ueno by JR, and Ginza and Roppongi by subway without having to transfer!
・A TV, household appliances, and amenities are provided, making it ideal for long-term stays as you will feel like you're at home.
host_about:
I was born and raised in Kanda, near Akihabara. Now I live in Akihabara, surrounded by delicious restaurants. My wife and I are both in love with good food and travelling to new places!

Your room is located only three minutes' walk from the high-paced, addictive 'Otaku' mecca of electronics, anime, maids and more that is Akihabara. Akihabara contains both this trendy, almost futuristic city pulsing with life, as well as ample nostalgic throwbacks to days long past, and even traditional culture which has survived for hundreds of years. The culture of "Downtown Edo" (an old name for Tokyo) beats underneath the surface, showing itself in the Kanda Festival and Yanagimori Shrine. Just walking the nearby streets is an experience in the balance and contrast between the traditional Japan, Japan in the modern era, and the Japan of today.

I aim to provide a room that leaves every guest returning home from their travels thinking "I'm so glad I picked this room!". I am looking forward to your visit!



아내도 저도 먹는 것과 여행을 아주 좋아합니다.

숙소는 애니메이션과 메이드·전자 상가 등 매력적인 문화의
발신지인 "아키하바라"에서 도보 3분정도 떨어진 곳에 있습니다.
그리고 여기는 400년 이상 지속 되어 온 "칸다 축제"와 "야나기모리 신사"가 있습니다.
또한"에도 서민 문화"도 살아 숨쉬고 있는 곳입니다.

주변의 골목을 산책하면 근대적 건물과 전통 문화의 조화와
콘트라스트를 즐길 수가 있습니다.

여러분의  멋진 여행의 한 순간에 "이 숙소를 골라서 진짜 너무 다행이야 "
라는 말을 들을수 있도록 마음을 담아서 인테리어에 힘을썼습니다.

여러분의 방문을 진심으로 기다리고 있습니다.

秋葉原に近い「神田」で生まれ育ち、現在は美味しい飲食店が
たくさん集まる「秋葉原」で暮らしています。

妻も私も食べる事と旅行に行く事が大好きです。
 
お泊り頂くお部屋は、アニメやメイド・電気街など魅力的な文化の
発信地である「秋葉原」に徒歩３分の立地にあります。
同時に４００年以上続く「神田祭り」や「柳森神社」が町には有り、
今なお「江戸下町文化」が脈々と息づいています。
 
周辺の路地を散策すると、近代的な建物と伝統文化の調和と
コントラストを楽しんで頂けると思います。
 
皆さんの素晴らしい旅のひと時に、「このお部屋を選んでよかった」
と言って頂けるようなお部屋作りを目指しています。
 
皆さんのお越しを心よりお待ちしています。

발신지인 "아키하바라"에서 도보 3분정도 떨어진 곳에 있습니다.
그리고 여기는 400년 이상 지속 되어 온 "칸다 축제"와 "야나기모리 신사"가 있습니다.
또한"에도 서민 문화"도 살아 숨쉬고 있는 곳입니다.

주변의 골목을 산책하면 근대적 건물과 전통 문화의 조화와
콘트라스트를 즐길 수가 있습니다.

여러분의  멋진 여행의 한 순간에 "이 숙소를 골라서 진짜 너무 다행이야 "
라는 말을 들을수 있도록 마음을 담아서 인테리어에 힘을썼습니다.

여러분의 방문을 진심으로 기다리고 있습니다.

秋葉原に近い「神田」で生まれ育ち、現在は美味しい飲食店が
たくさん集まる「秋葉原」で暮らしています。

妻も私も食べる事と旅行に行く事が大好きです。
 
お泊り頂くお部屋は、アニメやメイド・電気街など魅力的な文化の
発信地である「秋葉原」に徒歩３分の立地にあります。
同時に４００年以上続く「神田祭り」や「柳森神社」が町には有り、
今なお「江戸下町文化」が脈々と息づいています。
 
周辺の路地を散策すると、近代的な建物と伝統文化の調和と
コントラストを楽しんで頂けると思います。
 
皆さんの素晴らしい旅のひと時に、「このお部屋を選んでよかった」
と言って頂けるようなお部屋作りを目指しています。
 
皆さんのお越しを心よりお待ちしています。

neighborhood_overview:
Komagome is often overshadowed by Tokyo’s more famous neighborhoods, but it offers a unique glimpse into Tokyo's quieter, more traditional side. It's a place where you can still find old wooden houses, traditional craft shops, and a slower pace of life. The area’s rich history, combined with its beautiful gardens and local culture, makes it a delightful area to explore.

Komagome is easily accessible via the JR Yamanote Line and the Tokyo Metro Namboku Line, The Station serves as the main transit hub, connecting visitors to the various attractions within the neighborhood.

Arrival is convenient whether you’re coming from the Tokyo Narita Airport or Haneda Airport, as the useful Yamanote Lopp Line offers easy access to the Komagome Station as well as the key destinations such as Ueno, Tokyo, Shinagawa, Shibuya, and Shinjuku, ensuring you can effortlessly navigate the city and maximize your stay.

host_about:
私のお部屋に興味を持っていただき、ありがとうございます！

私は20代のときに仕事を辞め、2年半かけて約60カ国を巡るバックパッカーをしていました。観光地を巡るよりもその地の生活をして現地の方々と交流することが何よりも楽しかったです。

日本に帰国後、その経験から「生活をするように旅をする」ことができるお部屋を作りました。観光に便利な立地というだけではなく、快適ながらもより日本での生活を経験できるお部屋をイメージしています。

このホストというお仕事は多種多様な国籍、宗教、文化をお持ちの外国のゲストと交流できるのが何よりも楽しいです。

私のお部屋がみなさんの日本体験の一助になれば本当に嬉しいです。
みなさんの日本滞在が素晴らしい思い出になることを願っています。


特に好きな国
・グアテマラ（一番長期で約3ヶ月滞在しました！）

name: 新規オープン！秋葉原徒歩３分　フルリノベーション40㎡　＃401
description: Enjoy a stylish stay at this centrally-located place.
host_about:
I was born and raised in Kanda, near Akihabara. Now I live in Akihabara, surrounded by delicious restaurants. My wife and I are both in love with good food and travelling to new places!

Your room is located only three minutes' walk from the high-paced, addictive 'Otaku' mecca of electronics, anime, maids and more that is Akihabara. Akihabara contains both this trendy, almost futuristic city pulsing with life, as well as ample nostalgic throwbacks to days long past, and even traditional culture which has survived for hundreds of years. The culture of "Downtown Edo" (an old name for Tokyo) beats underneath the surface, showing itself in the Kanda Festival and Yanagimori Shrine. Just walking the nearby streets is an experience in the balance and contrast between the traditional Japan, Japan in the modern era, and the Japan of today.

I aim to provide a room that leaves every guest returning home from their travels thinking "I'm so glad I picked this room!". I am looking forward to your visit!



아내도 저도 먹는 것과 여행을 아주 좋아합니다.

숙소는 애니메이션과 메이드·전자 상가 등 매력적인 문화의
발신지인 "아키하바라"에서 도보 3분정도 떨어진 곳에 있습니다.
그리고 여기는 400년 이상 지속 되어 온 "칸다 축제"와 "야나기모리 신사"가 있습니다.
또한"에도 서민 문화"도 살아 숨쉬고 있는 곳입니다.

주변의 골목을 산책하면 근대적 건물과 전통 문화의 조화와
콘트라스트를 즐길 수가 있습니다.

여러분의  멋진 여행의 한 순간에 "이 숙소를 골라서 진짜 너무 다행이야 "
라는 말을 들을수 있도록 마음을 담아서 인테리어에 힘을썼습니다.

여러분의 방문을 진심으로 기다리고 있습니다.

秋葉原に近い「神田」で生まれ育ち、現在は美味しい飲食店が
たくさん集まる「秋葉原」で暮らしています。

妻も私も食べる事と旅行に行く事が大好きです。
 
お泊り頂くお部屋は、アニメやメイド・電気街など魅力的な文化の
発信地である「秋葉原」に徒歩３分の立地にあります。
同時に４００年以上続く「神田祭り」や「柳森神社」が町には有り、
今なお「江戸下町文化」が脈々と息づいています。
 
周辺の路地を散策すると、近代的な建物と伝統文化の調和と
コントラストを楽しんで頂けると思います。
 
皆さんの素晴らしい旅のひと時に、「このお部屋を選んでよかった」
と言って頂けるようなお部屋作りを目指しています。

host_about:
はじめまして！Kanです。私たちの宿へようこそ！
私は都内で、妻、娘、息子の4人で暮らしています。
職業は建築の設計の仕事をしており、特に古い建物の良さを残しながら、魅力的に再生するリノベーションが大好きです。この宿も古い民家を、木の架構を一部見せながら、とても雰囲気のある宿にリノベーションしました！
宿のある葛飾区は下町情緒があり、おいしい総菜屋さんや、お店もあちこちにあり、長期間滞在するのにとてもよい場所で、私もとても気に入っています。
また、私は世界中を旅するのが好きで、これまでに、イタリア、フランス、スペイン、ポルトガル、オランダ、イギリス、ドイツ、中国、韓国、台湾、ベトナム、マレーシア、インドなどを訪れ、旅先でスケッチした絵の一部を宿にも飾っており、旅先での異国の雰囲気を少しでも共有できると嬉しく思います。
もし何か質問やご要望など、私たちがサポートできることがありましたら、いつでもお声掛けください！

neighborhood_overview:
The Honjo area is a "calm, easy-to-live-in town where history and modernity coexist in harmony"!
This area retains the atmosphere of the Edo period, is dotted with shopping streets and restaurants, and is extremely convenient for daily life. If you go a little further, you will find plenty of spots where you can enjoy nature and sightseeing, such as the walking paths along the Sumida River, Tokyo Skytree, and Sumida Aquarium. It is an attractive area with good access to various parts of Tokyo, where you can enjoy a quiet and comfortable life!
host_about:
わたしたち「Sumyca」は、スマホ1つで住宅、宿泊共に予約が完結する短期賃貸プラットフォームです。全国で１５００室以上の物件が掲載されている予約サイトとして、世界各国から日本にお越しになる皆さまに宿泊施設を提供しています。

Sumycaが扱うすべての物件ではスマートチェックインを導入しており、スマホ１つで契約からチェックインまで、全てオンラインで完結することができます

お困り事やご質問は、コンシェルジュがすぐにご対応させていただきますので、初めての東京滞在でも安心です。

東京都内は山手線内を中心に、観光やリモートワークに便利な物件を数多く揃えております。

host_about:
以前中国国籍、現在日本国籍.
20歲時來日本留學,日本語學校畢業後升入日本大學。大學畢業後在日本第三大旅行社H.I.S就職了五年.很喜歡旅行,去過塞班,韓國,長崎,香港,台灣,沖繩,泰國,夏威夷,喜歡去世界各地走走看看,品嚐各地的美食,體驗不同國家的文化.通過Airbnb認識了很多朋友,很開心,也很有成就感,雖然大家來自不同的國家,說著不同的語言,但是大家都很友善,這使我更有信心和動力努力去成為最棒房東!大家有任何關於日本的問題可以隨時聯繫我,我會很熱心的解答的。願大家在日本度過愉快的假期.一期一會!
I have been a chinese woman before,but now I change my nationality to Japanese.I have came to Japan to learn the language when I was twenty years old and graduated from Japanese University.After graduation,I have been one of the merbership of the HIS travel agencies for five years which was the most famous travel agencies in Japan.I like travelling the world.I have been to Saipan,Korea,Nagasaki,Hongkong,Taiwan,Okinawa,Thailand,Hawaii and so on.In these coutries,I`d like to eat foods from all over the world and to learn something from the different cultures.Through Airbnb,I have made a lot of friends here.I feel so happy and the sense of achievement.Although we come from different countries and speak different languages,but we are so friendly and it makes me so confident to try my best to be the best hostess.If you have some problems in Japan,please feel freely to contact me and we will reply to you as soon as possible.Wish you have a nice trip in Japan.

host_about:
我是創業一代，也曾是賽車手，開過戰鬥機，見過美國總統，走遍世界大多數國家。
2021年，因為喜欢動漫、櫻花與紅葉等因素，我選擇移居東京，一個人在安靜與喧囂並存中，度過了四年。

回首過往，塵埃落定。留下的，是對生命更深的體悟。我不再將就，也不再執著於不對的人與事。
過去的一切，皆為序章。

我開始學習攝影，只為記錄旅途中的動人瞬間。也期待著「她」的出現，我攤開世界地圖，她指一處，我們便出發。

關於這間旅館

這間旅館名為「一期一會（First In Stay)」，希望每位來訪的旅人都能留下最美好回憶，即使只是短暫停留，也值得擁有獨一無二的體驗。

旅館原由代理公司經營一年多，評價一直不錯。直到最近我重新造訪，才發現許多可以改進的細節。
於是我做出決定——放下其他工作，親自打理。

2025年8月，我註冊帳號，開始經營這間旅館，並將一樓改造成住客專屬的小酒館。
如果我在，歡迎來坐坐，聊聊旅途中的故事，喝点免费的茶或酒。
人生難得的每一次相遇，都值得被珍惜。
這裡，我們用心款待每一位過客。

description: This is a simple and functional 1K room located in the Yoyogi area.It can accommodate up to 2 people, and 2 single beds of 100 cm are available.The kitchen is fully equipped with everyday necessities such as a gas stove, cookware, refrigerator, and electric kettle, and you can cook for yourself.The bath and toilet are separate, and you can relax and heal from your travels in the bathroom with a bathtub.It also has free Wi-Fi and a washing machine, making it ideal for short to medium-term stays.Access to Yoyogi Station and Shinjuku Station is also good, making it a convenient location for both sightseeing and business.Enjoy a comfortable stay in Tokyo in a clean and calm space.
host_about:
我是房东 [LSG]
我的求学旅程横跨韩国、美国与日本，并曾走访超过 25 个国家，深入感受各地多元的生活方式与文化。这些经历让我深刻体会到，旅行的意义不仅在于观光，更在于融入当地、体验真实生活。
长期从事房地产行业的背景，使我在挑选房源时拥有专业眼光。每一处空间都经过精心甄选与布置，既舒适便利，配备设施齐全，力求为客人提供高品质的入住体验。
真诚希望来到这里的您，不仅能领略日本的风景，更能在日常的细节中感受温度与美好。
欢迎走进我用心准备的房源，享受愉快的旅程，并留下独一无二的回忆。
欢迎来到日本，欢迎来到我的家！

name: N3 · NewOpen!浅草付近!観光地へのアクセス良好!
description:
This is a 2 person accommodation (prefab hut) located in the downtown area.
Located a 7-10-minute walk to Asakusa Station, Azuma Bridge in Sumida-ku, Tokyo, is a beautiful bridge over the Sumida River and connects the Sensoji Temple area to the Tokyo Skytree area, making it a great area for sightseeing.
You will also be captivated by the Azuma Bridge, which changes the charm of the four seasons.

Spring (Cherry blossom season):
The area around Azumabashi is known for about 300 cherry blossom trees.In spring, peach-coloured flowers color the river bank and a beautiful tunnel of cherry blossoms.The Murdashi Sakura Festival and Sumida Park Cherry Blossom Festival are held, and many people visit.

Summer:
It is also nice to walk around Azuma Bridge while feeling the cool breeze of the Sumida River.On summer nights, the lit bridges create a fantastic atmosphere.

description:
Welcome to a hidden urban hotel in a quiet residential neighborhood of Kiyosumi Shirakawa.
The rooms are in the "Japan Design Style", which blends the calmness of Japan with the warmth of Scandinavia.The space, wrapped in the warmth of wood and soft lighting, is stylish yet relaxing.Relax and talk during your trip, and be invited to a comfortable sleep at night...You can have such a high-quality, relaxing time.
Access is excellent, and it is a great location just a 3-minute walk from the nearest Toei Oedo Line and Tokyo Metro "Kiyosumi Shirakawa Station" and a 6-minute walk from "Morishita Station" on the Toei Oedo Line and Toei Shinjuku Line.It is 18 minutes to Shinjuku and 24 minutes to Shibuya, and you can easily get to major tourist destinations in Tokyo.Enjoy sightseeing and shopping during the day, and return to the quiet town at night to refresh.There are cafes, restaurants, convenience stores, and supermarkets nearby, so you can easily enjoy dining and shopping.
host_about:
ようこそ～日本へ
micoです。
私達は現在、東京と京都の二拠点生活をしています。
中学生の時からフィギュアースケートで海外の試合に出て、高校生の時に全日本フィギュアースケート選手権アイスダンスで優勝し世界選手権にも出場した事があり、その頃から世界を旅することが大好きになり2016年に夫婦で3ヶ月間世界一周もしました。
その中で私が最も印象に残っているのが旅先で出逢う人！でした。
いろんな国の人とふれ合うことが好きなので今度は旅行に行くから迎える側にもなってみたいと思い沢山の方に日本の魅力を満喫する為にゲストの皆さまが私の部屋でやすらいで疲れが取れる場所になったらと思います。
ここで楽しく過ごされます様に…

Hello! I am ying  .

I would like to meet and make friends .
Come share my hobby and let us enjoy Japan together.
Welcome and look forward to your visit.

yingと申します｡
お越しして頂く皆様と仲良くしたいと思います｡
  民宿は東京の足立区にあり､千住大橋(8分)と北千住駅(11分)両方使えます｡
北千住、京成千住大橋駅はﾊﾞｽで羽田空港と直通です｡

我叫瑩,希望和愛好旅行的您們成为朋友｡
宿位於東京,最近車站是京成線的千住大橋,千住大橋站有巴士可以直接前往羽田機場,用地铁到成田机场也十分方便｡地處上野,秋葉原,浅草等地的商業圈｡
同時距離JR北千住站也不遠,交通發達,有5條地鐵線路直通｡浅草,上野,秋叶原直达10分左右,周邊4所大學,大型商场O1O1,24小時便利店等設施齊全｡観光購物十分便利｡

歡迎您的到來!
